about.bio: Full-stack developer with experience across frontend and backend development, as well as machine learning projects. Skilled in building responsive, user-friendly interfaces and developing efficient backend systems. Proven track record in building scalable applications, integrating APIs, and leveraging AI-assisted coding tools to accelerate delivery.
focus: High-performance Next.js apps (App Router) with great UX
Scalable backend services and clean API integrations
AI/ML pipelines, model design, and product-ready AI integration

experience.title: Frontend Team Lead | Next.js & AI Integration
experience.description: Lead frontend development with Next.js, creating responsive, high-performance interfaces and integrating AI-driven features in collaboration with backend teams.
achievements: Lead delivery of responsive, user-friendly product experiences with Next.js
Partner with backend teams to ship AI-assisted features and smooth API integrations
Mentor teammates and coordinate tasks to keep execution fast and consistent

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained scalable web applications using Next.js and Firebase, leveraging AI-assisted coding tools for faster delivery. Implemented responsive designs, integrated APIs, and ensured high performance.
achievements: Built and shipped responsive Next.js features end-to-end
Integrated third-party APIs and AI capabilities to accelerate product delivery
Focused on performance, reliability, and clean developer experience

experience.title: Next.js Developer & Team Lead
experience.description: Lead frontend development with Next.js, ensuring responsive UI and smooth API integration. Mentor junior developers, coordinate tasks, and collaborate with backend teams to optimize performance.
achievements: Led frontend execution across multiple projects and shipped production features
Mentored junior developers and coordinated tasks across teams
Partnered with backend teams to improve performance and integration quality

experience.title: Machine Learning Intern
experience.description: Contributed to AGI research, working on data modeling, algorithm optimization, and AI-driven automation as part of cross-functional teams exploring advanced AI techniques.
achievements: Supported research experiments through data modeling and pipeline iteration
Optimized algorithms and contributed to AI-driven automation workflows

experience.title: Machine Learning Intern
experience.description: Led development of an AI crop recommendation system using Random Forest. Managed the ML pipeline and built a full-stack app with React, Tailwind, and Django.
achievements: Built an end-to-end ML pipeline and shipped a Random Forest-based recommendation model
Delivered a full-stack product experience integrating the model into a web app

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
experience.description: Built applications with React and Tailwind; collaborated on UI/UX and API development; managed data with PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
achievements: Built UI features with React and Tailwind and collaborated on UI/UX improvements
Worked across APIs and data layers using PostgreSQL and MongoDB

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
